Video.summary: Contemplate the timeless appeal that makes France the world's most visited tourist destination.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: France through the Ages
Video.title: Point Zero: Charting Our Course

Video.summary: Mine the layers of history that reveal how Paris evolved from an ancient settlement to the capital of France.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: France through the Ages
Video.title: The Birth and Rise of Paris

Image.alt: The Birth and Rise of Paris
The Birth and Rise of Paris
The Birth and Rise of Paris

Video.summary: Discover the remarkable palace of Versailles as the self-contained world of Louis XIV.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: France through the Ages
Video.title: The Splendor of Versailles

Video.summary: Visit key locations in Paris where the French Revolution of 1789 unfolded.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: France through the Ages
Video.title: Paris in Revolution

Video.summary: From thousand-year-old castles to contemporary art museums, look at the scope of all Britain has to offer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Welcome to Britain

Video.summary: Consider visiting other ancient ruins from prehistoric Britain, such as Avebury or Maiden Castle.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Prehistoric Britain

Video.summary: Consider the impact of the Roman conquest in the first century B.C.E. on Great Britain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Roman Britain

Video.summary: With the help of the Venerable Bede and other contemporary sources, explore the Anglo-Saxon conquests.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: England, Scotland, and Wales
Video.title: Anglo-Saxon and Viking Britain

Video.summary: Start your journey through forensic history with the Jack the Ripper murders.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: The Infamous Jack the Ripper

Video.summary: Study the special forensic category known as lust murder with the 1947 murder-mutilation of the Black Dahlia.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Analyzing the Black Dahlia Murder

Video.summary: Go to Hollywood and look at how crime scene investigation and autopsy results solve mysteries.
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Dissecting Hollywood Deaths

Video.summary: How can cutting-edge research and technology be applied to old cases and result in fresh conclusions?
Video.grandparentTitle: Forensic History: Crimes, Frauds, and Scandals
Video.title: Decomposition and Confusing Interpretations

Video.summary: Examine three key periods of U.S. intelligence before the birth of the CIA.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA

Image.alt: Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA
Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA
Secrecy, Democracy, and the Birth of the CIA

Video.summary: Learn how the CIA transformed from an intelligence agency to housing a premier covert-action unit.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops

Image.alt: George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops
George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops
George Kennan and the Rise of Covert Ops

Video.summary: Discover how the CIA failed to rein in the growing emphasis on covert operations.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: The CIA, China, and the Korean War

Image.alt: The CIA, China, and the Korean War
The CIA, China, and the Korean War
The CIA, China, and the Korean War

Video.summary: Ponder who was most responsible for Mohammad Mosaddeq's fall from power.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Agency: A History of the CIA
Video.title: The Iran Coup of August 1953

Video.summary: Begin with an overview of the historical, cultural, and natural riches of Germany and Austria. Preview the route the course will take along the Danube, Rhine, and Elbe Rivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Tours: Germany & Austria
Video.title: A Tale of Three Rivers

Video.summary: Your journey starts in Vienna, the cultural, political, and historical epicenter of Austria. In a sweeping tour, visit iconic sites ranging from palaces and cathedrals to cafes and taverns.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Tours: Germany & Austria
Video.title: Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture

Image.alt: Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture
Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture
Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture

Video.summary: Leaving Vienna along the Danube, enjoy the rich sights of the Wachau Valley. Discover the history, art and architecture in places like Krems, Mautern, Stift Göttweig, and Melk.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Tours: Germany & Austria
Video.title: The Wachau: Fine Wines and Majestic Monasteries

Image.alt: The Wachau: Fine Wines and Majestic Monasteries
The Wachau: Fine Wines and Majestic Monasteries
The Wachau: Fine Wines and Majestic Monasteries

Video.summary: Stop first at the vibrant city of Linz, Austria's contemporary mecca for art, culture, and technology. Crossing into Germany, discover the architecture and culture of Passau,
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Tours: Germany & Austria
Video.title: The Danube from Linz to Passau

Image.alt: The Danube from Linz to Passau
The Danube from Linz to Passau
The Danube from Linz to Passau

Video.summary: Begin your adventure into a fascinating world of fire and ice with an introduction to what makes Iceland such an unparalleled place to visit and explore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Iceland
Video.title: Exploring Iceland

Video.summary: Explore how the various types of volcanoes and the continued expansion of the mid-Atlantic ridge make Iceland a geologically active region like few others on our planet.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Iceland
Video.title: Volcanic Iceland Rises from the Sea

Image.alt: Volcanic Iceland Rises from the Sea
Volcanic Iceland Rises from the Sea
Volcanic Iceland Rises from the Sea

Video.summary: Look backward in time to learn how Iceland came to have so much ice, then, plunge into a world of ice tunnels, ice caves, and other extreme features.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Iceland
Video.title: Frozen in Time: Iceland's Glaciers

Video.summary: Investigate some of the many lakes, rivers, lagoons, waterfalls, hot springs, and geysers to be found throughout Iceland.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Iceland
Video.title: Iceland, a Land of Water
